title: Phase output envelope — protocol 1.0.0
description: Generic envelope for any phase's output object. v1.0.0 is intentionally NOT per-phase (codex WARNING — the implementation-phase had its own schema in early drafts but the loader's `${schemaName}-${version}.json` lookup doesn't carry a phase axis). A future protocol bump may split this into phase-specific variants (e.g. `phase-output-implement-2.0.0.json`) via the `COMPONENT_META.schemaName` indirection.

protocol_version.description: Cadence protocol version this phase output conforms to.
